evals.prompt: aidp-demo-goal로 제조 고객 제안미팅용 재고 예측 프로토타입 목표 잡아줘. 20시간 정도 돌릴 수 있게.
evals.expected_output: Creates AIDP demo goal run plan with intake, benchmark, Team boundary, deployment evidence, and completion audit.

evals.prompt: 고객 데이터가 restricted인데 외부 배포 없이 데모 패키지까지 만들고 싶어.
evals.expected_output: Uses privacy gate, blocks external deploy unless sanitized fixture data is used, and requires approved offline fallback evidence.

evals.prompt: FDE proposal demo 자동화: Team으로 구현은 돌리되 goal state는 worker가 건드리면 안돼.
evals.expected_output: Preserves Ultragoal leader ownership and constrains Team workers to evidence-only execution.
